query: While refactoring the UserService, I also want to add logging to every method and upgrade the TypeScript to strict mode.
expected_behavior: Refuses to mix feature additions (logging) and type system changes with the structural refactor
Explains that combining these three concerns in one PR makes the blast radius unverifiable
Proposes three separate tasks: one for the structural refactor, one for logging, one for TypeScript strict mode migration
Applies the principle: structural changes and behavioral changes are always separate commits
Does not proceed with all three simultaneously even if the user insists — escalates the risk
